Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. 6o6 v1.1: Faster 6502-on-6502 virtualization for a C64/Apple II Apple-1 emulator 23 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. TruffleRuby 157 upvotes, 16 comments
  3. TinyLoRA – Learning to Reason in 13 Parameters 203 upvotes, 30 comments
  4. MiniStack (replacement for LocalStack) 258 upvotes, 49 comments
  5. New Patches Allow Building Linux IPv6-Only, Option to Deprecate "Legacy" IPv4 13 upvotes, 0 comments
  6. CERN levels up with new superconducting karts 228 upvotes, 51 comments
  7. Teenage Engineering's PO-32 acoustic modem and synth implementation 132 upvotes, 27 comments
  8. Bring Back MiniDV with This Raspberry Pi FireWire Hat 81 upvotes, 15 comments
  9. 4D Doom 238 upvotes, 57 comments
  10. Chess in SQL 106 upvotes, 23 comments
  11. Intuiting Pratt Parsing 68 upvotes, 14 comments
  12. A dot a day keeps the clutter away 409 upvotes, 123 comments
  13. Claude Code Unpacked : A visual guide 706 upvotes, 235 comments
  14. Open source CAD in the browser (Solvespace) 351 upvotes, 110 comments
  15. Axios compromised on NPM – Malicious versions drop remote access trojan 1875 upvotes, 754 comments
  16. The Claude Code Source Leak: fake tools, frustration regexes, undercover mode 1254 upvotes, 508 comments
  17. Claude Wrote a Full FreeBSD Remote Kernel RCE with Root Shell (CVE-2026-4747) 110 upvotes, 36 comments
  18. Show HN: 1-Bit Bonsai, the First Commercially Viable 1-Bit LLMs 319 upvotes, 125 comments
  19. Is BGP Safe Yet? No. Test Your ISP 40 upvotes, 10 comments
  20. Ordinary Lab Gloves May Have Skewed Microplastic Data 122 upvotes, 43 comments
  21. Consider the Greenland Shark (2020) 12 upvotes, 1 comments
  22. Show HN: CLI to order groceries via reverse-engineered REWE API (Haskell) 133 upvotes, 49 comments
  23. Neanderthals survived on a knife's edge for 350k years 185 upvotes, 138 comments
  24. OpenAI closes funding round at an $852B valuation 479 upvotes, 436 comments
  25. In Case of Emergency, Make Burrito Bison 3 (2017) 17 upvotes, 8 comments
  26. I Quit. The Clankers Won 192 upvotes, 168 comments
  27. Show HN: Sycamore – next gen Rust web UI library using fine-grained reactivity 32 upvotes, 23 comments
  28. Show HN: Baton – A desktop app for developing with AI agents 12 upvotes, 7 comments
